# Synthetic Fixtures

Auto-generated round-trip fixtures — each file is produced by running a
built-in `Preset` config through the full `buildAST → emitCode` pipeline and
saving the result alongside the source config.

**Do not hand-edit files in this directory.** They are regenerated by:

```bash
pnpm --filter @kyberstation/codegen exec tsx tests/fixtures/generate-synthetic.ts
```

(Script is added in Phase 6 of the `feat/wysiwyg-spatial-lockup` sprint.)

## Layout

Each fixture is a pair:

- `<preset-id>.cpp` — the emitted ProffieOS style code
- `<preset-id>.json` — the exact `BladeConfig` used to generate it

## Intent

These fixtures are the safety net that keeps round-trip lossless as the
reconstructor and emitter evolve. Every `.json` must reconstruct to a config
that matches its source on the fields in `RT_PHASE0_FIELDS` (and, after later
phases, `RT_PHASE2_FIELDS` and `RT_PHASE3_FIELDS`).
